cleaned_html_body:
Dear Gildan Activewear Dom Rep Textile Team,

We noticed your impressive import volume of 3,142 shipments, particularly in knitwear under HS 6110. We’ve successfully partnered with similar US importers and understand your quality and volume requirements.

Arooj Enterprises is a leading garment manufacturer in Pakistan, specializing in knitted and woven garments with a capacity of 150,000 units/month. Our ISO 14001, SEDEX, and OEKO-TEX certifications ensure compliance with US standards. Our product range aligns with your import profile, particularly in apparel categories like T-shirts, men’s outerwear, and sportswear.

What sets us apart is our vertical integration—from yarn to finished garment—which ensures consistency and cost efficiency. We’ve supplied major brands in the USA, UK, and EU, and we’re confident we can meet your requirements.

By partnering with us, you can expect competitive pricing, reduced lead times, and access to our extensive network of suppliers and manufacturers. We're also offering a 5% discount on all orders placed within the next 6 weeks.

If you're interested in learning more about our services and how we can support your business goals, please reply to this email or schedule a call with me at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Asad Irfan | Senior Marketing Manager | Arooj Enterprises | www.texbase.com
